bulletin.title: Flopps Wildcard Corporate Update
bulletin.summary: Flopps published a surprise corporate update with immediate market implications.
bulletin.paraphrase: Something strange just hit the collector funnel and nobody was ready for it.
bulletin.marketImpact: The secondary market is repricing the news in real time.
bulletin.collectorImpact: Collectors, stores, and flippers are all trying to decode the implication.
